channel.title: SSbusinessAndMarket
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbusinessAndMarket, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Meet Goldman’s athlete whisperer: the woman who stands guard against $1 billion of fraud targeting sports fortunes
item.description: Nicole Pullen Ross has advised the ultrawealthy for 26 years at Goldman Sachs. She talked to Fortune about working in sports and seeing a number get r...

item.title: AI generated identical résumés for a man and a woman: Hers was more likely to be labeled ‘weak,’ while his got a 97% approval rating
item.description: “If people believe they will be judged more harshly for using AI, they are less likely to adopt it—regardless of their capability."

item.title: Iran war is draining world’s oil buffer at an unprecedented pace
item.description: Morgan Stanley estimates global oil stockpiles dropped by about 4.8 million barrels a day between March 1 and April 25.

item.title: UK moves warship to Middle East for potential Hormuz mission
item.description: HMS Dragon, a Type-45 warship capable of destroying guided missiles, is likely to form part of the UK’s offer for the defensive naval mission.
